_meta.voice: Direct American English. Travel-agency voice: practical, operations-focused. Dual audience (travelers + agent partners). Keep SMART-tours and STEP as product names.

strings.1 кабінет агентів · 1 CRM · 2 аудиторії: 1 agent portal · 1 CRM · 2 audiences · 3 sales tracks on the site
strings.FAQ з відповідями на часті питання турис: FAQ with answers to common traveler questions
strings.Rich Tour — сайт туристичної агенції з *: Rich Tour — travel-agency site with an *agent portal*
strings.Rich Tour — туристична агенція, яка орга: Rich Tour is a travel agency running bus, sea, excursion, SMART, and corporate trips. We built a site that isn't just a tour brochure — it's a full digital platform for clients, agents, and managers. Travelers find the right trip and submit an inquiry fast; partners work through a dedicated agent portal.
strings.Rich Tour отримали не просто сайт, а пов: Rich Tour got more than a website — a full platform for selling tours and working with agents. Users can find a trip fast, browse categories, read the terms, check the FAQ, and submit an inquiry. Managers receive leads through the CRM; agents have their own system access. The site structures sales, simplifies the team's work, and makes choosing a tour clearer for clients.
strings.Адмін-панель і CRM для керування *заявка: Admin panel and CRM for managing *inquiries*
strings.Адмінку для керування контентом і турами: An admin panel for content and tour management
strings.Адаптивну версію для мобільних пристроїв: A responsive build for mobile devices
strings.Давати агентам окремий доступ до потрібн: Give agents separate access to the information they need
strings.Для проєкту реалізували адмін-панель, що: We built an admin panel so the Rich Tour team can update tours, categories, copy, reviews, FAQ, and other site sections themselves. CRM integration keeps inquiries from getting lost and routes them to managers faster. That matters in travel — clients often pick a trip quickly, compare options, and expect a fast reply. The agent portal makes the site useful for partners selling tours through the system, not just end clients.
strings.Для туристичної агенції важливо не прост: For a travel agency, showing destinations isn't enough — you need a system that actually sells tours. Without a catalog, search, and separate agent access, even a strong offer gets lost — clients compare fast and expect a quick response.
strings.Зробити пошук турів зручним для клієнтів: Make tour search easy for clients
strings.Ми розробили сайт для Rich Tour як турис: We built the Rich Tour site as a travel platform with a catalog, filters, an agent portal, and CRM integration.
strings.На головній сторінці користувач одразу м: On the homepage the user can jump straight into tour search by country and month. From there the site walks them through categories, destinations, benefits, reviews, FAQ, and an inquiry form. We also built a separate agent portal — the site serves end clients and partners who sell tours.
strings.Оновлювати тури, категорії, тексти, відг: Update tours, categories, copy, reviews, and FAQ
strings.Отримувати заявки в CRM без втрат для ме: Capture inquiries in the CRM so managers don't lose leads
strings.Підключити CRM для обробки заявок: Connect a CRM for inquiry handling
strings.Презентувати окремі напрями: SMART-тури,: Present separate tracks: SMART tours, corporate travel, STEP
strings.Спростити шлях користувача від вибору ту: Shorten the path from picking a tour to submitting an inquiry
strings.Структурувати велику кількість турів і н: Structure a large inventory of tours and destinations
strings.Туристична платформа: каталог турів, пош: Travel platform: tour catalog, search by country and month, agent portal, CRM for inquiries, SMART tours, and corporate travel.
strings.Rich Tour — сайт туристичної агенції з к: Rich Tour — travel-agency site with agent portal & CRM | Code-Site.Art

sections[_key==\"sec6\"].bodyEn: For a travel agency, showing destinations isn't enough — you need a system that actually sells tours. Without a catalog, search, and separate agent access, even a strong offer gets lost — clients compare fast and expect a quick response.
sections[_key==\"sec9\"].bodyEn: We built the Rich Tour site as a travel platform with a catalog, filters, an agent portal, and CRM integration.

On the homepage the user can jump straight into tour search by country and month. From there the site walks them through categories, destinations, benefits, reviews, FAQ, and an inquiry form. We also built a separate agent portal — the site serves end clients and partners who sell tours.
sections[_key==\"fd187ec9f59b\"].bodyEn: We built an admin panel so the Rich Tour team can update tours, categories, copy, reviews, FAQ, and other site sections themselves. CRM integration keeps inquiries from getting lost and routes them to managers faster. That matters in travel — clients often pick a trip quickly, compare options, and expect a fast reply. The agent portal makes the site useful for partners selling tours through the system, not just end clients.
sections[_key==\"sech\"].bodyEn: Rich Tour got more than a website — a full platform for selling tours and working with agents. Users can find a trip fast, browse categories, read the terms, check the FAQ, and submit an inquiry. Managers receive leads through the CRM; agents have their own system access. The site structures sales, simplifies the team's work, and makes choosing a tour clearer for clients.
